case_title: JIA WEN CHEN VS. SPRINT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIA WEN AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT CORPORATION

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT CORPORATION
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,659.74 FILED BY CHEN, JIA WEN AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIA WEN AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT CORPORATION CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-14-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
